backend.changelog: On-demand CadBridge ZIP fetch from manifest URL: new CadBridgeInstallerCache service resolves the installer ZIP from the manifest's cadBridge.downloadUrl (public GitHub Release) on demand, verified against manifest sha256, cached under the app_data volume at /app/data/cadbridge-cache/{sha256}.zip. /api/downloads/CadBridge-Setup.zip now tries the cache first (auto-refresh on every CadBridge release), then falls back to the configured bind-mount path, then the repo layout. Eliminates the manual `scp CadBridge-Setup.zip` step gateway operators previously had to run after every CadBridge release. Concurrent workstation requests collapse to a single GitHub fetch via a SemaphoreSlim. Cache keyed by sha256 so multiple versions coexist (rollback-friendly). Sub-second cache hits after the initial download. Pairs with CadBridge 1.8.43 but works for any future CadBridge bump without further server work.

cadBridge.changelog: Architectural simplification: EngItem-driven OpenDoc7 is now the sole primary doc-resolution strategy in GenerateOutputsOnSta -- runs for every BOM item instead of being a fallback. SW handles already-open docs idempotently and serves the latest rep automatically because EngItem ids are stable cross-rep (only 3DShape ids rep-version). Eliminates the rep-drift problem class that motivated the prior three-stage lookup. swDocByPlmid index removed entirely (empirically dead on rep-drift tenants -- 23/23 items across PIN-000081 + PIN-000084 resolved via EngItemId, zero strict-PLMID hits). swDocByFilename retained as defensive fallback. ~3s wall-clock overhead per 12-item BOM vs. prior near-zero lookup; acceptable for single-strategy correctness.
